name: Charter Hall Long Wale Reit
analysis: CLW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.7850. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.8300, stop A$3.5046, target A$4.8062 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
